prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约1392→5019→4665→7082→8390，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约6998名；2025年基准约8390名；本省理科（物理类）计划2021–2024年稳定在18–19人，2025年增至23人；2026年计划30人，较2025年扩招约30.4%，扩招幅度较大，按供需弹性原理将推高位次数字（竞争加剧）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第57名（较2025年第54名下降3位），近年排名小幅波动，整体处于中上水平；2026年声誉数据中未见该校明显负面或正面事件；抖音热度总排名第91位，评价为“一般”，短视频曝光量中等，未出现高热关注信号；历史投档异常记录中无该校断档记录，报考心理相对平稳；应用经济学A、工商管理A、外国语言文学A-，均为A-/A级学科，财经类学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济大类2024年热度评估为“分化观望”，整体热度平稳；本省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，竞争明显加剧；学校位于北京，属一线城市跨省招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招约30.4%及本省物理类考生增加约19.7%，扩招与考生增量双重推高位次数字；在2025年基准8390名基础上，再考虑考生规模扩大带来的额外竞争压力，预测最低位次约9942名，区间9442–10442名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 1392 → 5019 → 4665 → 7082 → 8390, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6998 positions in the last 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 8390; the provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was stable at 18–19 people from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 23 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 30 people, an expansion of about 30.4% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, which according to the supply-demand elasticity principle will push the ranking number higher (increased competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking in 2026 approximately 57th (down 3 places from 54th in 2025), with slight fluctuations in recent years, overall at an upper-middle level; no significant negative or positive events for this school were found in the 2026 reputation data; Douyin heat total ranking 91st, rated as 'average', short video exposure moderate, no high-heat attention signal; no record of enrollment gaps in historical submission anomalies, relatively stable application psychology; Applied Economics A, Business Administration A, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, all A-/A level disciplines, with strong finance and economics discipline strength, providing stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2024 heat assessment for finance/economics/economy categories is 'differentiated wait-and-see', overall heat stable; the provincial physics category examinees in 2026 are about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the school is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, with cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of about 30.4% in 2026, and the increase of about 19.7% in provincial physics category examinees, both expansion and examinee increase push the ranking number higher; based on the 2025 baseline of 8390, and considering the additional competitive pressure from the expanded examinee pool, the predicted minimum ranking is about 9942, with a range of 9442–10442.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Law Category (Law, Big Data Double Bachelor's Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 9442–10442, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 9400), you can focus on sprinting for top majors like Financial Engineering and Finance Category; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 10400), you should mainly fill in Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 368 → 363 → 346 → 543 → 626. From 2021 to 2023, it remained stable at a high level of 346–368, but dropped sharply to 543 in 2024 and further shifted to 626 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 280 positions over the past two years, showing a clear backward trend. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 626. The provincial liberal arts (history category) enrollment plan remained stable at 14–15 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 18 in 2025, and is planned to be 25 in 2026, an expansion of about 38.9% compared to 2025. This significant expansion, according to the principle of supply-demand elasticity, will push the ranking number higher (intensified competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 57th in 2026 (down 3 places from 54th in 2025), with slight fluctuations in recent years, overall at an upper-middle level. In 2026 reputation data, no significant negative or positive events were observed for this university. Douyin popularity total ranking 91st, rated as 'average', with medium short video exposure. No record of enrollment gaps in historical admission anomalies, indicating relatively stable application psychology. Applied Economics A, Business Administration A, Foreign Language and Literature A-, all A-/A level disciplines, with outstanding strength in finance and economics, providing stable appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2024 popularity assessment for finance/economics/economy categories is 'differentiated and wait-and-see', with overall popularity stable. In 2026, the number of history category candidates in the province is approximately 88,500, an increase of about 17.0% compared to 75,641 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The university is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, and recruits across provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the clear backward trend in historical rankings over the past two years, the significant enrollment expansion of about 38.9% in 2026, and the increase of about 17.0% in provincial history category candidates, both expansion and candidate growth push the ranking number higher. Based on the 2025 baseline of 626, and further considering the additional competitive pressure from the expanded candidate pool, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 782, with a range of 641–923.

- Finance Category (Finance, International Finance and Markets, Economics and Finance, Investment, Insurance).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 641–923, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for冲刺, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 640), you can focus on冲刺热门 majors like Law Category and Finance Category. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 900), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
